multimodal_summarization.system_message: You are an expert abstractive multimodal summarization system. Your task is to synthesize information from both text and images into coherent, comprehensive summaries. Generate fluent, well-structured summaries that capture the essential meaning and key information while maintaining factual accuracy.
multimodal_summarization.description: Optimized system message for abstractive multimodal summarization with focus on comprehensive coverage and ROUGE performance

with_images.training_prompt:
Using the provided images and the following article, write a comprehensive abstractive summary that synthesizes the main ideas, key events, and important visual information. Create a coherent narrative that covers all significant points while using clear, natural language:

{text_content}
with_images.inference_prompt:
Using the provided images and the following article, write a comprehensive abstractive summary that synthesizes the main ideas, key events, and important visual information. Create a coherent narrative that covers all significant points while using clear, natural language:

{text_content}
with_images.description: Optimized for abstractive summarization with comprehensive coverage to improve ROUGE scores while incorporating visual information

without_images.training_prompt:
Write a comprehensive abstractive summary of the following article that synthesizes the main ideas, key events, and important information. Create a coherent narrative that covers all significant points while using clear, natural language:

{text_content}
without_images.inference_prompt:
Write a comprehensive abstractive summary of the following article that synthesizes the main ideas, key events, and important information. Create a coherent narrative that covers all significant points while using clear, natural language:

{text_content}
without_images.description: Text-only abstractive summarization optimized for comprehensive coverage and ROUGE performance

avoid: Overly concise at expense of coverage
